title: Better Deepslate Ore Drops
description: Doubles the amount of resources dropped by deepslate ores, similar to the deepslate double mod.
body:
Doubles the amount of resources dropped by deepslate ores, similar to the deepslate double mod. Silk touch and fortune work. Tested on 1.20.1, but should work on all gave versions after 1.17.

deepslate double mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/deepslatedubble
